notes: This is the final integrated guide-level dataset; it is distinct from run-output/datasets/case45_review_table.*, which is a downstream review table.
The raw-derived processed layer remains in data/processed/ for auditability.
Use data/final/case45_cross_scale_integrated_dataset.jsonl as the primary showcase dataset entry point.

caveats: This is a 35-guide demonstration-scale dataset, not a powered benchmark cohort.
L1/L2/L5 coverage is 27/35 because NT controls do not have gene-level UniProt/Reactome/DepMap endpoint annotations.
L3 is measured for perturbation guides as guide-vs-control RNA response; NT guides are encoded as control_reference rather than perturbation response rows.
The raw-derived cDNA selected count matrix is represented by summary files; full selected cDNA matrix is not stored in this compact showcase repository.
showcase_readiness.summary: The integrated dataset supports a cross-scale showcase at guide-level grain. 27 perturbation guides have L0-L5 coverage; 8 NT control guides are retained as controls with L0/L4/control-reference L3 but no biological L1/L2/L5 endpoint.
